sheets.name: Ref Bank Sort Code Prefix
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_bank_sort_code_prefix_mapping ORDER BY bank_name, prefix

sheets.name: Ref Country
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_country ORDER BY country_name

sheets.name: Ref Country County State Town
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_country_county_state_town_mapping ORDER BY country_code, county_state_name

sheets.name: Ref Country Tax ID Type
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_country_tax_id_type_mapping ORDER BY country_code

sheets.name: Ref Customer Class
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_customer_class ORDER BY source_value

sheets.name: Ref Location Mapping
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_location_mapping ORDER BY location_name

sheets.name: Ref Post Code County
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_post_code_county ORDER BY postcode

sheets.name: Ref Post Code District
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_post_code_district ORDER BY postcode

sheets.name: Ref Post Code Workday Region
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_post_code_workday_region ORDER BY post_code_region

sheets.name: Ref Source Business Unit
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_source_business_unit_mapping ORDER BY source_value

sheets.name: Ref Source Country Code
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_source_country_code_mapping ORDER BY source_country_code

sheets.name: Ref Source Country Name
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_source_country_name_mapping ORDER BY source_country_name

sheets.name: Ref Source Payment Terms
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_source_payment_terms ORDER BY source_payment_terms_id

sheets.name: Ref Supplier Category
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_supplier_category_mapping ORDER BY source_category_id

sheets.name: Ref Workday Country State Region
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_workday_country_state_region ORDER BY country, instance

sheets.name: Ref Worker Type
sheets.query: SELECT * FROM ref_worker_type_mapping ORDER BY source_value
